# API Contract: [Module Name]

> Generated by Claude Gen Plugin — [Date]
> Referenced by: PRD [US-XXX], SRS Section [3.X]

## Base Path
`/api/[module]`

## Authentication
[Required / Optional / Public] — [JWT Bearer Token / API Key / Session Cookie]

## Common Headers

| Header | Value | Required |
|--------|-------|----------|
| Content-Type | `application/json` | Yes |
| Authorization | `Bearer <token>` | [Yes/No — per endpoint] |
| Accept | `application/json` | Yes |

## Response Format

### Success Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": { },
  "meta": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 20,
    "total": 100
  }
}
```

### Error Response
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": {
    "code": "ERROR_CODE",
    "message": "Human-readable message",
    "details": []
  }
}
```

---

## Endpoints

---

### POST /api/[module]

**Description**: Create a new [resource]

**Auth**: Required

**Rate Limit**: [X requests/minute]

**Request**:

Headers:
```
Authorization: Bearer <token>
Content-Type: application/json
```

Body:
```json
{
  "field1": "string — description (required)",
  "field2": "number — description (optional, default: 0)",
  "field3": "boolean — description (optional, default: false)"
}
```

Validation:
| Field | Rules |
|-------|-------|
| field1 | Required, string, min: 1, max: 255 |
| field2 | Optional, number, min: 0 |
| field3 | Optional, boolean |

**Response** (`201 Created`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "field1": "string",
    "field2": 0,
    "field3": false,
    "createdAt": "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "updatedAt": "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z"
  }
}
```

**Error Responses**:
| Status | Code | Message | When |
|--------|------|---------|------|
| 400 | VALIDATION_ERROR | "field1 is required" | Missing/invalid fields |
| 401 | UNAUTHORIZED | "Authentication required" | No/invalid token |
| 409 | CONFLICT | "[Resource] already exists" | Duplicate unique field |

---

### GET /api/[module]

**Description**: List [resources] with pagination and filtering

**Auth**: Required

**Rate Limit**: [X requests/minute]

**Request**:

Headers:
```
Authorization: Bearer <token>
```

Query Parameters:
| Param | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| page | number | No | 1 | Page number |
| limit | number | No | 20 | Items per page (max: 100) |
| sort | string | No | "createdAt" | Sort field |
| order | string | No | "desc" | Sort order (asc/desc) |
| search | string | No | — | Search query |
| [filter] | string | No | — | Filter by [field] |

**Response** (`200 OK`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "uuid",
      "field1": "string",
      "field2": 0,
      "createdAt": "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z"
    }
  ],
  "meta": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 20,
    "total": 100,
    "totalPages": 5
  }
}
```

**Error Responses**:
| Status | Code | Message | When |
|--------|------|---------|------|
| 401 | UNAUTHORIZED | "Authentication required" | No/invalid token |
| 400 | VALIDATION_ERROR | "Invalid query parameters" | Bad page/limit values |

---

### GET /api/[module]/:id

**Description**: Get a single [resource] by ID

**Auth**: Required

**Request**:

Headers:
```
Authorization: Bearer <token>
```

Path Parameters:
| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| id | uuid | [Resource] ID |

**Response** (`200 OK`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "field1": "string",
    "field2": 0,
    "field3": false,
    "createdAt": "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "updatedAt": "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z"
  }
}
```

**Error Responses**:
| Status | Code | Message | When |
|--------|------|---------|------|
| 401 | UNAUTHORIZED | "Authentication required" | No/invalid token |
| 404 | NOT_FOUND | "[Resource] not found" | Invalid ID |

---

### PATCH /api/[module]/:id

**Description**: Update a [resource]

**Auth**: Required

**Request**:

Headers:
```
Authorization: Bearer <token>
Content-Type: application/json
```

Path Parameters:
| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| id | uuid | [Resource] ID |

Body (partial update — all fields optional):
```json
{
  "field1": "string — updated value",
  "field2": "number — updated value"
}
```

**Response** (`200 OK`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "field1": "updated string",
    "field2": 42,
    "field3": false,
    "createdAt": "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "updatedAt": "2025-01-02T00:00:00Z"
  }
}
```

**Error Responses**:
| Status | Code | Message | When |
|--------|------|---------|------|
| 400 | VALIDATION_ERROR | "Invalid field value" | Validation failed |
| 401 | UNAUTHORIZED | "Authentication required" | No/invalid token |
| 403 | FORBIDDEN | "Not allowed to update this resource" | Not owner/admin |
| 404 | NOT_FOUND | "[Resource] not found" | Invalid ID |

---

### DELETE /api/[module]/:id

**Description**: Delete a [resource]

**Auth**: Required (Admin or Owner)

**Request**:

Headers:
```
Authorization: Bearer <token>
```

Path Parameters:
| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| id | uuid | [Resource] ID |

**Response** (`200 OK`):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "deleted": true
  }
}
```

**Error Responses**:
| Status | Code | Message | When |
|--------|------|---------|------|
| 401 | UNAUTHORIZED | "Authentication required" | No/invalid token |
| 403 | FORBIDDEN | "Not allowed to delete this resource" | Not owner/admin |
| 404 | NOT_FOUND | "[Resource] not found" | Invalid ID |

---

## Data Types

### [Resource] Entity

| Field | Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------|------|------------|-------------|
| id | uuid | PK, auto-generated | Unique identifier |
| field1 | string | NOT NULL, max 255 | [Description] |
| field2 | number | DEFAULT 0 | [Description] |
| field3 | boolean | DEFAULT false | [Description] |
| createdAt | datetime | NOT NULL, auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | NOT NULL, auto | Last update timestamp |

### Enums

```
[EnumName]:
  - VALUE_1: "Description"
  - VALUE_2: "Description"
  - VALUE_3: "Description"
```

---

## Webhooks (if applicable)

| Event | Payload | Trigger |
|-------|---------|---------|
| [module].created | Full [resource] object | After creation |
| [module].updated | Updated fields + ID | After update |
| [module].deleted | ID only | After deletion |
